page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The hardware includes 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with a bundled 1919 GB SSD. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark results place the ecs.i3.2xlarge in the average tier for multi-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 7024.3 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 4514.0. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by a stress-ng single-core score of 1317.98 and a weak single-threaded gzip compression rate of 23.03 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth is average, reaching 51.37 GB/sec for large block reads and 41.05 GB/sec for large block writes. Database operations and web serving throughput also perform within the middle 50% tier, with Redis SET operations handling 6.87 million operations per second and static web serving reaching 6.68 GB/sec.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and the substantial 1919 GB local SSD storage, this server offers a resource-dense profile for storage-heavy and memory-intensive workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation and large local storage make it suitable for database hosting, caching layers like Redis, and general-purpose applications requiring fast local disk access. However, the weaker single-core performance and poor medium-model LLM inference speeds suggest it is less optimal for compute-heavy single-threaded tasks or modern AI workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM and a bundled 1919 GB local SSD. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate average multi-core capabilities, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 4514.0 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 7024.3, though single-core performance is weaker. Memory bandwidth and database operations, such as Redis SET handling 6.87 million operations per second, consistently rank in the average tier. With its high local storage capacity and 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is well-suited for database hosting, caching layers, and storage-intensive applications, while being less optimal for compute-heavy or single-threaded workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.2xlarge is an x86_64 server with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 1919 GB local SSD, offering balanced multi-core performance for databases and storage workloads.
